evidence.snippet: Lightweight elastomer solutions for UAV and UAS platforms — engineered to manage vibration, shock, and heat in weight-constrained systems.

#### Shock & Vibration Isolators
Precision-formulated isolators reduce mechanical shock and vibration to safeguard avionics and sensors. Each design ensures long-term damping stability under extreme flight and temperature conditions.

items.notes: Shock & vibration isolators are the lead UAV-marketed product; site explicitly positions elastomer solutions for 'vibration, shock, and heat' management in UAV/UAS platforms.
